links.title: Generate Forecast for this Location
links.tooltip: Click to trigger the ML pipeline for the current lat/lon. Data appears in ~3-5 minutes.

panels.title: Forecast Status
panels.description: Auto-triggers prediction pipeline when you enter a new location. Green = data ready, Yellow = generating.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, temperature_2m AS "Temperature"
FROM public.weather_observations
WHERE lat = CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  AND lon = CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, cloud_cover AS "Cloud Cover"
FROM public.weather_observations
WHERE lat = CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  AND lon = CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, wind_speed_10m AS "Wind Speed"
FROM public.weather_observations
WHERE lat = CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  AND lon = CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT time, shortwave_radiation AS "GHI"
FROM public.weather_observations
WHERE lat = CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  AND lon = CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.description: Latest model training info and prediction count

targets.rawSql:
SELECT trained_at AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Models Trained"
FROM public.weather_training_runs
WHERE lat = CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  AND lon = CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
GROUP BY trained_at
ORDER BY trained_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

panels.title: Models

panels.description: Solid = actual observations, Dashed = ML forecast, Dotted = provider forecast

targets.rawSql:
WITH location AS (
  SELECT CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS lat, CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS lon
), latest_ml AS (
  SELECT MAX(wf.issue_time) AS issue_time
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'ml' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
), latest_provider AS (
  SELECT MAX(wf.issue_time) AS issue_time
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'provider' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
)
SELECT time, metric, value FROM (
  SELECT o.time, 'actual' AS metric, o.temperature_2m AS value
  FROM public.weather_observations o JOIN location l ON TRUE
  WHERE o.lat = l.lat AND o.lon = l.lon
  UNION ALL
  SELECT wf.forecast_time, 'ml_forecast', wf.temperature_2m
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE JOIN latest_ml i ON wf.issue_time = i.issue_time
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'ml' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
  UNION ALL
  SELECT wf.forecast_time, 'provider_forecast', wf.temperature_2m
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE JOIN latest_provider i ON wf.issue_time = i.issue_time
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'provider' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
) series_data
WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: GHI / Shortwave Radiation (W/m²)

panels.description: Solid = actual observations, Dashed = ML forecast, Dotted = provider forecast

targets.rawSql:
WITH location AS (
  SELECT CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS lat, CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS lon
), latest_ml AS (
  SELECT MAX(wf.issue_time) AS issue_time
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'ml' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
), latest_provider AS (
  SELECT MAX(wf.issue_time) AS issue_time
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'provider' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
)
SELECT time, metric, value FROM (
  SELECT o.time, 'actual' AS metric, o.diffuse_radiation AS value
  FROM public.weather_observations o JOIN location l ON TRUE
  WHERE o.lat = l.lat AND o.lon = l.lon
  UNION ALL
  SELECT wf.forecast_time, 'ml_forecast', wf.diffuse_radiation
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE JOIN latest_ml i ON wf.issue_time = i.issue_time
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'ml' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
  UNION ALL
  SELECT wf.forecast_time, 'provider_forecast', wf.diffuse_radiation
  FROM public.weather_forecast wf JOIN location l ON TRUE JOIN latest_provider i ON wf.issue_time = i.issue_time
  WHERE wf.forecast_type = 'provider' AND wf.lat = l.lat AND wf.lon = l.lon
) series_data
WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time)
ORDER BY time;

panels.title: DHI / Diffuse Radiation (W/m²)

panels.description: MAE and RMSE from the latest training run for each target variable

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  target,
  ROUND(CAST(metrics->>'mae' AS NUMERIC), 4) AS mae,
  ROUND(CAST(metrics->>'rmse' AS NUMERIC), 4) AS rmse,
  ROUND(CAST(metrics->>'r2' AS NUMERIC), 4) AS r2,
  train_rows,
  validation_rows,
  trained_at
FROM public.weather_training_runs
WHERE lat = CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  AND lon = CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
  AND model_version = (
    SELECT model_version FROM public.weather_training_runs
    WHERE lat = CAST('${lat}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
      AND lon = CAST('${lon}' AS DOUBLE PRECISION)
    ORDER BY trained_at DESC LIMIT 1
  )
ORDER BY target;

panels.title: Latest Model Training Metrics
